'''Yintal''' was a short [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]]. In [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]] he was working as a [[Doctor/Legends|doctor]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and treated [[Plat Mallar]]. As of [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] he was an analyst for [[New Republic Fleet Intelligence|Fleet Intelligence]]. He was killed in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] when the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Raid on Wayland (25 ABY)|attacked]] [[New Nystao]] in an attempt to silence [[Elan]].
